[DQC.US.0001.59] The concept RevenuePercentageOnSales with a value of 0.444 is dimensionally qualified with the PlanNameAxis and the base taxonomy member SalesMember. Only extension members should be used with the axis PlanNameAxis. The properties of the fact for RevenuePercentageOnSales are: Period: 2023-12-31 Dimensions: us-gaap:PlanNameAxis=us-gaap:SalesMember, us-gaap:ConcentrationRiskByTypeAxis=edbl.com:NumberOfCustomerOneMember Unit: pure
Rule Element Id:59 Rule version: 29.0.2 - EDBL_instance_2023_2025.xml 2255
